CloudSync
New: Real-time collaboration is here

Sync your files everywhere, effortlessly

CloudSync brings your team's files together in one secure, lightning-fast platform. Collaborate in real-time, access anywhere, and never lose a file again.

Start Free Trial Watch Demo

Everything you need to stay in sync

Powerful features designed for modern teams who need speed, security, and simplicity.

Real-Time Sync

Changes propagate instantly across all devices. No waiting, no manual uploads — just seamless synchronization.

Enterprise Security

AES-256 encryption at rest and in transit. SOC 2 Type II compliant with advanced access controls.

Team Collaboration

Share folders, leave comments, and co-edit documents. Built for teams of 2 to 20,000.

Smart Upload

Drag and drop any file type. Our AI automatically organizes, tags, and indexes your content.

Advanced Analytics

Track file activity, storage usage, and team engagement with beautiful, actionable dashboards.

Cross-Platform

Native apps for Mac, Windows, Linux, iOS, and Android. Plus a powerful web interface.

Simple, transparent pricing

No hidden fees. No surprises. Choose the plan that fits your team.

Starter

For individuals

$9/mo
  • 100 GB storage
  • 3 team members
  • Basic analytics
  • Email support

For growing teams

  • 1 TB storage
  • 25 team members
  • Advanced analytics
  • Priority support
  • Custom branding
